reasoning: The recent VIX data shows a sharp spike to 23.43 on Nov 21. The FRED trend analysis predicts a 0.36 probability of a value higher than 23.43 for the nearest resolution date (Nov 30). Usually, VIX exhibits mean reversion, which would suggest this probability drops further as we look further into the future. However, observing the explicit instruction that uncertainty must increase and probabilities for more distant dates must be closer to 0.5, I have linearly adjusted the probabilities for the longer horizons (Dec 23 and Feb 21) towards 0.5 to strictly satisfy this constraint.
